description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI build check that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job at 2 AM UTC. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a 30-minute timeout that checks out the repository, installs .NET 8 preview, enables problem matchers, builds the code with warnings as errors, runs unit tests and integration tests with code coverage, generates a code coverage report, and publishes it to Coveralls and Codecov. Also, send a Discord notification on scheduled workflow failure.
